    void
    test_07_mergeAntCvg()
    if an anticipated and a convergent event are merged the abstraction is treated like an anticipated event: PO for convergence is created for convergent concrete events.
    void
    test_08_mergeAntCvg()
    if an anticipated and a convergent event are merged the abstraction is treated like an anticipated event: PO for anticipation is created for anticipated concrete events.
    void
    test_09_antRefinesCvg()
    A PO is generated for anticipated events refining convergent events.
    void
    test_10_anticipatedDoesNotModifyVariantDeterministic()
    No PO is generated for an anticipated event that does not modify the variant expression (case with a deterministic action).
    void
    test_11_anticipatedDoesNotModifyVariantNonDeterministic()
    No PO is generated for an anticipated event that does not modify the variant expression (case with a non-deterministic action).
    void
    test_12_LocalHyps()
    Verify the local hypotheses of VAR and NAT POs.
    void
    test_13_VWDmulti()
    A VWD PO is generated for each potentially ill-defined variant (case of multi variants).
    void
    test_14_FINmulti()
    A FIN PO is generated for each potentially infinite set variant (case of multi variants).
    void
    test_15_VARAllSet()
    A VAR PO is generated for each set variant, when they are all modified by a convergent or anticipated event.
    void
    test_16_VARAllInt()
    A VAR and a NAT PO is generated for each natural variant, when they are all modified by a convergent or anticipated event.
    void
    test_17_VARModOnly()
    A VAR (and a NAT PO) is generated for each variant which is modified by a convergent or anticipated event.
    void
    test_17_VARSetUntouched()
    A VAR is generated for the last variant when no variant is modified by a convergent event.
    void
    test_18_NATSetUntouched()
    A VAR and a NAT PO is generated for the last variant when no variant is modified by a convergent event.
    void
    test_19_VARsingle()
    A VAR and a NAT PO is generated for a single labeled variant.

    • test_07_mergeAntCvg

      public void test_07_mergeAntCvg() throws Exception
      if an anticipated and a convergent event are merged the abstraction is treated like an anticipated event: PO for convergence is created for convergent concrete events.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • test_08_mergeAntCvg

      public void test_08_mergeAntCvg() throws Exception
      if an anticipated and a convergent event are merged the abstraction is treated like an anticipated event: PO for anticipation is created for anticipated concrete events.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • test_09_antRefinesCvg

      public void test_09_antRefinesCvg() throws Exception
      A PO is generated for anticipated events refining convergent events. The abstract event is regarded as "only" being anticipated; the stronger property is "forgotten".
      Throws:
      Exception

    • test_10_anticipatedDoesNotModifyVariantDeterministic

      public void test_10_anticipatedDoesNotModifyVariantDeterministic() throws Exception
      No PO is generated for an anticipated event that does not modify the variant expression (case with a deterministic action).
      Throws:
      Exception

      Throws:

      A VAR PO is generated for each set variant, when they are all modified by a convergent or anticipated event.
      Throws:
      Exception

      public void test_16_VARAllInt() throws Exception
      A VAR and a NAT PO is generated for each natural variant, when they are all modified by a convergent or anticipated event.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • test_17_VARModOnly

      public void test_17_VARModOnly() throws Exception
      A VAR (and a NAT PO) is generated for each variant which is modified by a convergent or anticipated event.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • test_17_VARSetUntouched

      public void test_17_VARSetUntouched() throws Exception
      A VAR is generated for the last variant when no variant is modified by a convergent event. For an anticipated event, there is no PO.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • test_18_NATSetUntouched

      public void test_18_NATSetUntouched() throws Exception
      A VAR and a NAT PO is generated for the last variant when no variant is modified by a convergent event. For an anticipated event, there is no PO.
      Throws:
      Exception

      public void test_19_VARsingle() throws Exception
      A VAR and a NAT PO is generated for a single labeled variant.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • addInvariants

      private ITypeEnvironment addInvariants(IMachineRoot mch, String[] invImages) throws RodinDBException
      Adds all the given invariants to the machine, together with the variables they contain and returns the resulting type environment.
      Parameters:
      mch - some Event-B machine
      invImages - array of predicate strings
      Returns:
      the resulting type environment
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

      Throws:
      Exception
